rulings.Case Title: THOMAS MCALLISTER et al VS. ALLIED PACKING & SUPPLY, INC. et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT And Notice Of Motion For Summary Judgment
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, January 6, 2016 in Department 503, Line 1. Defendant BorgWarner Morse Tec Inc.'s motion for summary judgment is continued to January 27, 2016 per the December 29, 2015 stipulation and order. = (503/TLJ)

rulings.Case Title: MYRA MCDANIEL VS. WESTERN BUILDING MATERIALS COMPANY
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, January 6, 2016 in Department 503, Line 2. Defendant FMC Technologies, Inc.'s motion to admit counsel pro hac vice is continued on the court's own motion to January 13, 2016. = (503/TLJ)

rulings.Case Title: VESTER FORTNER VS. CERTAINEED CORPORATION ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To File First Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, January 6, 2016 in Department 503, Line 3. Plaintiff's motion for leave to file first amended complaint is off calendar at the moving party's request and notification that Lois Fortner passed away. = (503/TLJ)
